label: HNW / Multi-Gen
description: HNW overrides other signals. Senior-partner routing regardless of age / income.

label: Business Owner — Exit-minded
predicate: Q2.3 = Business owner AND Q2.1 ≥ 50 AND Q5.3 ∈ (want out in 5 yrs / no plan but thinking)

label: Retired / Decumulation
predicate: Q2.3 ∈ (Fully retired, Partly retired) AND Q2.1 ≥ 60

label: Pre-Retiree Affluent
description: Peak RW target for retirement planning.

label: High-Earner Mid-Career
description: £100k trap fires — RW's richest provocation territory.

label: Mass-Affluent Mid-Career
description: Accumulating but not yet at RW's core provocation point.

label: Early Accumulator
description: Low-fit fallback. Short friendly form, nurture-only route.
